id.description: Unique identifier for the job (auto-generated UUID if omitted).

inputDataS3Location.description: S3 URI for the input data.

processedDataS3Location.description: S3 URI where processed output is written.

previousDataProcessingJobId.description: Job ID of a previous job for incremental processing.

sagemakerIamRoleArn.description: IAM role ARN for SageMaker execution.

neptuneIamRoleArn.description: IAM role ARN for Neptune access.

processingInstanceType.description: ML instance type (default auto-selected ml.r5 type).

processingInstanceVolumeSizeInGB.description: Disk volume size in GB (default 0 means auto-selected).

modelType.description: The type of model to prepare data for.

configFileName.description: The data specification configuration file name.

subnets.description: VPC subnet IDs for SageMaker processing.

volumeEncryptionKMSKey.description: KMS key for storage volume encryption.

s3OutputEncryptionKMSKey.description: KMS key for S3 output encryption.

enableInterContainerTrafficEncryption.description: Whether to enable inter-container traffic encryption.
